zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire於1125年出生在英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆時，她的父親Payn fitz John40歲，母親Sybil Talbot26歲。她於大約1148年與Warin de Munchensy在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1191年9月29日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可，埋葬在英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire于1125年出生在英国諾福爾可霍爾哈姆时，她的父亲Payn fitz John40岁，母亲Sybil Talbot26岁。她于大约1148年与Warin de Munchensy在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1191年9月29日之前在英国英格兰諾福爾可，埋葬在英国諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire was born in 1125, in Holkham, Norfolk, England, her father, Payn fitz John, was 40 and her mother, Sybil Talbot, was 26. She married Warin de Munchensy about 1148, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 29 September 1191, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Holkham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire est née en 1125, à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Payn fitz John, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sybil Talbot, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Warin de Munchensy environ 1148, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 29 septembre 1191, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire 1125 in Holkham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Payn fitz John 40 und ihre Mutter Sybil Talbot 26. Sie hat um 1148 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Warin de Munchensy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 29. September 1191 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Holkham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire è nata il nel 1125 nel Holkham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Payn fitz John, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Sybil Talbot, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Warin de Munchensy circa 1148, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 29 settembre 1191, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Holkham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshireが1125年にイギリスノーフォルクホールクハムで生まれた時，父Payn fitz Johnは40歳，母Sybil Talbotは26歳であった。約1148年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでWarin de Munchensyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1191年9月29日以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクホールクハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire(이)가 1125년 영국 노르폴크 홀카에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Payn fitz John(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Talbot(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Warin de Munchensy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 9월 29일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 홀카에 묻혔다.

mn.Gooderstone, Swaffham, Norfolk, England: Gooderstone, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire nasceu em 1125, em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Payn fitz John, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Talbot, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Warin de Munchensy aproximadamente 1148, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 29 de setembro de 1191, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire родилась в 1125 г. в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Payn fitz John было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Talbot, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warin de Munchensy около 1148 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 29 сентябрь 1191 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire nació en 1125, en Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Payn fitz John, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sybil Talbot, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Warin de Munchensy aproximadamente 1148, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 29 de septiembre de 1191, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
